item.description:
Hallo, I’m a bioinformatics PhD student working on [epi]genomics and other genome wide high throughput data. Though I work with data in many different contexts, my main interest is in understanding general and disease biology using state-of-the-art techniques.

In addition, I’m highly interested in the field of machine learning & data science to generate hypotheses, answer questions and explore data to unravel the hidden patterns by building models.

I would love to simplify scientific findings to spread the knowledge to a broader audience. I believe general public needs to understand the scientific work in a meaningful way instead of imbibing wrong information from random websites on the internet.

And programming is love!
